changeColors.description: Change specific colors in an image by selecting a source color and replacing it with a new one.
changeColors.shortDescription: Quickly swap colors in a image
changeColors.title: Change colors in image

fromColor.title: From color
fromColor.similarityDescription: Match this % of similar colors of the from color. For example, 10% white will match white and a little bit of gray.

changeOpacity.description: Easily adjust the transparency of your images. Simply upload your image, use the slider to set the desired opacity level between 0 (fully transparent) and 1 (fully opaque), and download the modified image.
changeOpacity.title: Change image Opacity

compress.description: Reduce the file size of one or multiple images while preserving visual quality. Upload a batch of images and download them all at once as a ZIP archive.
compress.failedToCompress: Image(s) compression failed. Please try again.
compress.maxFileSizeDescription: Maximum output file size per image in megabytes
compress.qualityDescription: Image quality percentage — lower value means smaller file size
compress.shortDescription: Compress one or multiple images at once.
compress.someFailedToCompress: Some images could not be compressed and were skipped.
compress.title: Compress Images

compressPng.description: This is a program that compresses PNG pictures. As soon as you paste your PNG picture in the input area, the program will compress it and show the result in the output area. In the options, you can adjust the compression level, as well as find the old and new picture file sizes.
compressPng.title: Compress png

convertJgpToPng.description: Quickly convert your JPG images to PNG. Just import your PNG image in the editor on the left
convertJgpToPng.shortDescription: Quickly convert your JPG images to PNG
convertJgpToPng.title: Convert JPG to PNG

createTransparent.description: Create a transparent version of an image by removing the chosen background color.
createTransparent.title: Create transparent PNG

crop.description: Crop images to remove unwanted areas.
crop.title: Crop Image

editor.description: Advanced image editor with tools for cropping, rotating, annotating, adjusting colors, and adding watermarks. Edit your images with professional-grade tools directly in your browser.
editor.shortDescription: Edit images with advanced tools and features
editor.title: Image Editor

imageToText.description: Extract text from images (JPG, PNG) using optical character recognition (OCR).
imageToText.shortDescription: Extract text from images using OCR.
imageToText.title: Image to Text (OCR)

qrCode.description: Generate QR codes for different data types: URL, Text, Email, Phone, SMS, WiFi, vCard, and more.
qrCode.shortDescription: Create customized QR codes for various data formats.
qrCode.title: QR Code Generator

removeBackground.description: Remove the background from an image to isolate the main subject with transparency.
removeBackground.title: Remove Background from Image

resize.description: Resize images using pixel dimensions or percentage scaling. Maintain aspect ratio and set width or height with automatic adjustment. Download results individually or as a ZIP archive.
resize.maintainAspectRatioDescription: Maintain the original aspect ratio of the image.
resize.percentageDescription: Percentage of original size (e.g., 50 for half size, 200 for double size)
resize.resizeByPercentageDescription: Resize by specifying a percentage of the original size.
resize.resizeByPixelsDescription: Resize by specifying dimensions in pixels.
resize.setHeightDescription: Specify the height in pixels and calculate width based on aspect ratio.
resize.setWidthDescription: Specify the width in pixels and calculate height based on aspect ratio.
resize.shortDescription: Resize one or multiple images at once.
resize.title: Resize Image

toolInfo.description: This tool allows you to resize one or multiple JPG, PNG, SVG, or GIF images at once. Upload a single image or a batch of images and resize them by specifying dimensions in pixels or by percentage, with options to maintain the original aspect ratio. When processing multiple images, results are bundled into a ZIP file for easy download.
toolInfo.title: Resize Image(s)

rotate.description: Rotate an image by a specified angle.
rotate.title: Rotate Image

split.title: Split Image into Pages
split.shortDescription: Split a large image into multiple pages (PDF).
split.description: Split a map or large image into pages matching the selected paper format and padding. Specify pixels per printing square and square count to scale the image correctly.
split.loadingText: Loading... This may take a moment.

padding.label: Padding
padding.description: Padding around the map on each page (in selected units)

pxPerSquareQuantity.label: Pixels per squares quantity
pxPerSquareQuantity.description: How many pixels correspond to the specified number of squares on the original image (horizontal or vertical)

squareQuantity.label: Squares quantity
squareQuantity.description: Number of play squares across (horizontal or vertical) used for scaling

unitsPerOneSquare.label: Units per square
unitsPerOneSquare.description: Physical size of one square in the selected units
